summary: Re-tested Perk Orbit after Shared_With=User_ID schema migration and Family Cards page. All 18 backend pytest tests PASS (12 prior + 6 new for share-by-ID, validation 400/404, partial unshare, shared-with endpoint, user_matches in /search/brand). Frontend Family Cards end-to-end flow PASS: PIN -> add Swiggy/FAMTEST voucher -> share via member tile -> open Family Cards from Reward Circle -> voucher listed -> topbar-back returns. Fixed one small UI regression: the Tag component dropped data-testid so family-count tag was not queryable; added prop spread.

ui_bugs.issue: Did not forward extra props -> data-testid='family-count' was lost. Fixed by spreading ...rest onto the span.

critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx is now ~1070 lines — keep an eye on the >700-line split guideline; consider extracting FamilyCardsPage, CirclePage, MembershipPage into /screens.

/api/circle/unshare accepts family_member_id without enforcing it belongs to user_pin (only ObjectId.is_valid). Low impact because $pull is scoped by voucher's user_pin, but consider validating membership for symmetry with /circle/share.
/api/vouchers/shared-with correctly filters by member_id; consider adding an index on vouchers.shared_with for scale.
Tag (and several other ui.jsx primitives) didn't forward extra props — pattern review: ensure all primitives accept ...rest so consumers can pass aria-* / data-testid.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py (updated share/unshare tests + 5 new tests for new endpoints)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the new Family Cards flow

seed_data_creation: Tests create+cleanup TEST_-prefixed vouchers and circle members under user_pin=1234. A mocked Pro membership remains active for user_pin=1234.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints exercised by /app/backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py. Run: pytest backend/tests/test_perk_orbit.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Backend Share now requires family_member_id as a valid ObjectId belonging to the user; unshare?family_member_id removes only that member; without param it clears (legacy). New GET /api/vouchers/shared-with?user_pin&member_id returns {member,vouchers}. Frontend: member tile testid 'open-family-cards-<id>'; Family Cards has 'family-count', 'family-cards-list' OR 'empty-family-cards', back via 'topbar-back'. PIN may reset on hot-reload — the test script handles both set-mode (two entries) and verify-mode (single entry).
rca of the issue: Tag component used `{ children, tone }` destructuring only, so data-testid='family-count' passed by the parent never reached the DOM. Fix: accept ...rest and spread onto the underlying span.
